name: sap-bdc
description: SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) plugin for Claude: 7 human-facing skills (onboarding, core admin, governance/catalog with hierarchical tags + glossary + KPIs deep-dive, connect/sharing with BDC<->Databricks data products, intelligent apps, SAP Databricks, SAP-Note troubleshooter) paired with a machine-facing MCP server that exposes 17 tools for Delta Sharing, CSN schema management, provisioning, validation (incl. ORD metadata + Databricks privileges), and diagnostics. Curated against 22 SAP Notes and 3 SAP help.sap.com guides.
